mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts ( post_code, creator_user_id, title, content, author_name, author_handle, topic_name, audience_type, display_time, like_count, comment_count, save_count, accent_tone, badge, image_url, anonymous_flag, location, created_at ) VALUES ( #{postCode}, #{creatorUserId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{authorName}, #{authorHandle}, #{topicName}, #{audienceType}, #{displayTime}, #{likeCount}, #{commentCount}, #{saveCount}, #{accentTone}, #{badge}, #{imageUrl}, #{anonymousFlag}, #{location}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.post_code, p.creator_user_id, p.title, p.content, p.author_name, p.author_handle, p.topic_name, p.audience_type, p.display_time, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.save_count, p.accent_tone, p.badge, p.image_url, p.anonymous_flag, p.location, p.deleted_flag, p.deleted_at, p.deleted_by, p.created_at, COALESCE(i.liked, 0) AS liked, COALESCE(i.saved, 0) AS saved FROM posts p LEFT JOIN post_interactions i ON i.post_id = p.id AND i.user_id = #{userId} WHERE p.post_code = #{postCode} AND p.deleted_flag = 0
SELECT post_id, user_id, liked, saved FROM post_interactions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND post_id = (SELECT id FROM posts WHERE post_code = #{postCode})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_interactions (user_id, post_id, liked, saved, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{postId}, #{liked}, #{saved}, NOW())

INSERT INTO post_comments ( comment_code, post_id, user_id, parent_comment_id, root_comment_id, reply_to_user_id, author_name, author_handle, content, deleted_flag, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{commentCode}, #{postId}, #{userId}, #{parentCommentId}, #{rootCommentId}, #{replyToUserId}, #{authorName}, #{authorHandle}, #{content}, #{deletedFlag}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, comment_code, post_id, user_id, parent_comment_id, root_comment_id, reply_to_user_id, author_name, author_handle, content, deleted_flag, deleted_at, deleted_by, created_at, updated_at FROM post_comments WHERE id = #{commentId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post_comments WHERE deleted_flag = 0 AND (id = #{rootCommentId} OR root_comment_id = #{rootCommentId})
mapper.update: UPDATE post_comments SET deleted_flag = 1, deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, deleted_by = #{deletedBy}, updated_at = #{deletedAt} WHERE id = #{commentId} AND deleted_flag = 0

UPDATE post_comments SET deleted_flag = 1, deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, deleted_by = #{deletedBy}, updated_at = #{deletedAt} WHERE deleted_flag = 0 AND (id = #{rootCommentId} OR root_comment_id = #{rootCommentId})
mapper.select: SELECT contact_id, user_id, followed FROM user_follow_contacts WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND contact_id = (SELECT id FROM alumni_contacts WHERE contact_code = #{contactCode})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_follow_contacts (user_id, contact_id, followed, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{contactId}, #{followed}, NOW())

INSERT INTO messages (message_code, conversation_id, sender_type, text_content, display_time, created_at) VALUES (#{messageCode}, #{conversationId}, #{senderType}, #{textContent}, #{displayTime}, #{createdAt})

INSERT INTO audit_logs ( actor_user_id, actor_role_snapshot, action_type, target_type, target_id, target_code, created_at ) VALUES ( #{actorUserId}, #{actorRoleSnapshot}, #{actionType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{targetCode}, #{createdAt} )
